title: KV-Cache Rust module
description:
Implement the Rust-side KV-Cache management wrapping Zig-allocated buffers.

src/kv_cache/cache.rs:
- KVCache: manages N layers of KVCacheLayer
- KVCacheLayer: wraps Zig-allocated pre-allocated K/V buffers via FFI
- Methods: append(layer, new_k, new_v), get(layer, 0..seq_len), reset(), current_len()
- Pre-allocates for max_seq_len at init. No re-allocation during use.
- Proper Drop impl to free Zig-allocated memory

src/kv_cache/strategy.rs:
- CacheStrategy trait for future extensibility
- PreAllocatedStrategy: current approach
- Document future: PagedStrategy, SlidingWindowStrategy

src/kv_cache/mod.rs: re-exports

Tests (mandatory):
- Create cache for 28 layers, max_seq=2048, 8 KV heads, head_dim=128
- Append single tokens sequentially, verify retrieval
- Full capacity: fill to max_seq_len, verify correctness
- Reset and reuse: verify clean state
- Memory: total allocation = 2 * num_layers * max_seq * n_kv * head_dim * sizeof(f32)
- No allocation after init (verified)

Pass/fail:
- Append + retrieve correct values
- No allocation after init
- Memory matches expected formula
- Reset produces clean state
